---
name: Goal
about: A bigger objective that breaks down into task sub-issues
title: "[Goal] "
type: Goal
---

## What does done look like?
<!-- One or two sentences. How will we know this goal is finished? -->

## Why now?
<!-- What makes this worth an active "Now" slot over everything else? -->

## Tasks
<!--
Add each task as a SUB-ISSUE of this goal (use the "Create sub-issue" /
"Add sub-issue" control under the description) — not as a plain checklist.
The sub-issues are what flow across the board; this goal stays up in your
Now/Next/Later view and shows their combined progress.
Keep it ONE level deep — tasks do not get their own sub-issues.
-->

## Out of scope
<!-- What this goal deliberately does NOT include. -->
